_doc: Player config. The seed ships ASSET-FREE so it boots with ZERO 404s: animation entries have no `sprite` yet, so the player renders as a clean fallback shape until art exists. When you generate per-action sheets with the generate2dsprite skill, add a `"sprite": "assets/sprites/player/<action>/sheet-transparent.png"` to each animation below (the loader auto-derives the matching pipeline-meta.json next to it). Stats/size/movement are tunable defaults — adjust per spec.
